title: Generics, Constraints, Inference, and Variance · Contract Lens: Variance Behavior
summary: Build reusable selectors and repositories that preserve relationships between keys, inputs, outputs, and callbacks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts variance behavior increment in a relationship-preserving generic data toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Analyze covariance, contravariance, invariance, and bivariant compatibility from producer and consumer positions.
Predict inference candidates, defaults, contextual inference, and when an explicit type argument hides a design problem.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
